title: Simple Name Colors
description: This makes it possible to change your name in  the chat and tab menu.
body:
Welcome to Dreamcraft Network's NameColors Mod!

This mod allows you to personalize your in-game identity by adding customizable username colors to both chat messages and the player tab list.

Simply type the command /namecolor in-game to open a menu of available colors. Select one, and your username will instantly updateтАФyour choice is saved automatically and will persist across sessions!

ЁЯУж Available Versions

Dreamcraft NameColors is available for the following Minecraft versions:

Minecraft 1.20.1

(More Versions Coming Soon)



Note: Always download the mod version that matches your Minecraft version.

ЁЯУБ Configuration Files

The mod uses two main configuration files:

config/dreamcraft_name_colors-common.toml тАФ Define or modify the list of available colors.
config/set-namecolors.json тАФ Stores each playerтАЩs chosen color (updated automatically when they use /namecolor).
ЁЯОи Customizing Colors

Want to add your own color? Just edit the TOML file! Colors are defined using standard hex codes.

Example: dreamcraft_name_colors-common.toml (default configuration)

```TOML
[colors]
# Define custom named colors. Format: "colorName=#RRGGBB"
# (Hex codes may include or omit the '#' prefix)
namedColors = [
  "blue=#0000FF",
  "red=#FF0000",
  "green=#00FF00",
  "orange=#FFA500",
  "pink=#FFC0CB",
  "gray=#808080",
  "black=#000000",
  "white=#FFFFFF",
  "yellow=#FFFF00",
  "gold=#FFD700",
  "aqua=#00FFFF"
]
```

ЁЯТб Tip: To add a new color, just append an entry like `"magenta=#FF00FF"` to the list and restart the game (or reload configs if your mod supports it).
ЁЯТ╛ Player Data Example

When a player selects a color, their preference is saved by UUID in the JSON file:

Example: set-namecolors.json

```json
{
  "players": {
    "380df991-f603-344c-a090-369bad2a924a": {
      "color": "#00FFFF",
      "name": "Dev"
    }
  }
}
```

тЬЕ Compatibility

Built for Fabric Loader (and compatible with popular mod loaders unless otherwise noted). Works seamlessly with Minecraft versions listed above.

Enjoy standing out in styleтАФwith Dreamcraft NameColors, your name, your rules! ЁЯМИ
